title: oldenlandia macrostemon
intro: Oldenlandia macrostemon, also known as "Qing Dai" or "White Astringent," is a perennial herb native to Southeast Asia and China, belonging to the family Rubiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Oldenlandia macrostemon include reducing fever, relieving rheumatism, and aiding in the treatment of certain types of cancer. Oldenlandia macrostemon is often prepared as a herbal tea or infused in hot water, and it can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
